morning.title: AI is more likely than humans to form biases when hiring
morning.summary: AI hiring tools may perpetuate and even amplify biases present in historical data.

morning.summary: Capital One released VulnHunter, an open-source AI tool designed to identify software vulnerabilities before they can be exploited by hackers.

morning.title: The cleanup trap: Stop asking RAG to fix bad data
morning.summary: Organizations should focus on preventing bad data rather than relying on tools to fix it after the fact.

gym.title: Why Netflix is betting on systems thinkers—not specialists—in the AI era

gym.title: On Making Organizational Culture Great,
